issues.title: arbitrary-send-eth
issues.description:
Escrow._releaseFunds() (contract.sol#77-85) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- address(seller).transfer(releaseAmount) (contract.sol#82)
issues.recommendation: Add access control and input validation

issues.title: missing-zero-check
issues.description:
Escrow.constructor(address,address)._buyer (contract.sol#41) lacks a zero-check on :
		- buyer = _buyer (contract.sol#42)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: missing-zero-check
issues.description:
Escrow.constructor(address,address)._seller (contract.sol#41) lacks a zero-check on :
		- seller = _seller (contract.sol#43)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)
issues.filename:

It is used by:

issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: naming-convention
issues.description: Parameter Escrow.depositFunds(uint256)._amount (contract.sol#48) is not in mixedCase
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: reentrancy-unlimited-gas
issues.description:
Reentrancy in Escrow._releaseFunds() (contract.sol#77-85):
	External calls:
	- address(seller).transfer(releaseAmount) (contract.sol#82)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- FundsReleased(releaseAmount) (contract.sol#84)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: immutable-states
issues.description: Escrow.buyer (contract.sol#7) should be immutable
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: immutable-states
issues.description: Escrow.seller (contract.sol#8) should be immutable
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: unchecked-transfer
issues.description: unchecked-transfer detected
issues.recommendation: Check return values or use SafeERC20

issues.title: gas-indexed-events
issues.description: GC: [amount] on Event [FundsDeposited] could be Indexed
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

issues.title: gas-indexed-events
issues.description: GC: [approver] on Event [TransactionApproved] could be Indexed
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

issues.title: gas-indexed-events
issues.description: GC: [amount] on Event [FundsReleased] could be Indexed
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

issues.title: gas-strict-inequalities
issues.description: GC: Non strict inequality found. Try converting to a strict one
issues.recommendation: Follow Solidity style guide

stage2_metadata.security_summary:
Contract Type: Custom
Classification Confidence: 90%
Access Control: role_based
Security Features: Standard
Implementation: Custom from scratch
Subtype: escrow

Reasoning: The contract involves holding funds and requires approval from both parties before releasing the funds, which is characteristic of an escrow system. This does not fit into any standard template like ERC20, ERC721, etc.

classification.reasoning: The contract involves holding funds and requires approval from both parties before releasing the funds, which is characteristic of an escrow system. This does not fit into any standard template like ERC20, ERC721, etc.
